description_long: This storage box is a robust, cubic container constructed from orange wooden planks reinforced with thick, gray metal corner brackets and bolts. The wood panels are arranged horizontally, with some sides featuring a diagonal support plank for added structural integrity. The metal brackets are prominently placed at each corner and along the edges, giving the box a fortified, industrial look. The box appears solid and heavy, suitable for protecting contents from external impacts. There are no visible handles, locks, or openings, suggesting it is a sealed unit. The overall design is utilitarian, making it ideal for use in urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or construction sites.
description: A sturdy orange wooden storage box reinforced with gray metal brackets and bolts, featuring diagonal support planks and a sealed, industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view shows horizontal orange planks with a prominent diagonal support and gray metal corner brackets.
description_view_1: This side displays only horizontal orange planks, with no diagonal support, and the same gray metal reinforcement.
description_view_2: Similar to the front, this view also features a diagonal support plank across the orange wood panels and gray metal brackets.
description_view_3: This side mirrors view 1, showing only horizontal planks and gray metal brackets, without a diagonal support.
attribute_lid_type: removable flat lid (implied, not visibly separate)
